The Feelies.blurb: New Jersey art-rock band formed in 1976, known for frenetic live performances and meticulous studio work. Reunited in 2008 after a 17-year hiatus.

quotes.text: We were getting kind of burnt with playing and touring at that point.

Diarrhea Planet.blurb: Nashville rock band active 2009–2018, known for a four-guitar lineup and ferociously energetic live shows.

Marnie Stern.blurb: New York-based guitarist known for her two-handed tapping technique, recorded for Kill Rock Stars. Praised for relentlessly high-energy live performances.
